summary: Iteration 4 scoped: AI Event Cover Image Generation. 4 user stories (US-4-1 through US-4-4) with comprehensive acceptance criteria. 10 tasks created spanning backend endpoint implementation, Flutter cubit refactor, UI development, and full test coverage. QA gate task included. Ready for architect phase.
artifacts: workflow/state.json (tasks T-4-1 through T-4-10, po_plan event)

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.notes: po.md (iteration goal, 4 user stories with acceptance criteria, task breakdown, assumptions, scope decisions, dependencies, next agent instructions) and state.json (10 iteration 4 tasks, po_plan + phase_complete events) are complete and committed.

qualityGates.name: scope_defined
qualityGates.notes: 4 user stories fully scoped with acceptance criteria, dependencies, and task breakdown. In-scope items (backend endpoint, cubit refactor, UI, tests) and out-of-scope items (caching, alternative image sources, prompt refinement) clearly delineated. Iteration 4 does not depend on Pencil design (unlike Iteration 3b); no design gate.

qualityGates.name: user_stories_clear
qualityGates.notes: US-4-1 (AI generation + loading + preview), US-4-2 (regenerate + custom image), US-4-3 (backend endpoint + Claude + Unsplash), US-4-4 (cubit state refactor). All written in mobile user behavior terms (rider/organizer perspective). Acceptance criteria use mobile interaction language (tap, overlay, regenerate). All criteria are testable.

qualityGates.name: task_breakdown_complete
qualityGates.notes: 10 tasks created (T-4-1 through T-4-10): 1 backend implementation, 1 backend unit tests (qa), 4 frontend implementation, 1 frontend unit tests (qa), 3 frontend widget tests (qa), 1 QA gate. All tasks mapped to stories and agents. Task descriptions include implementation details and dependencies.

qualityGates.name: dependencies_documented
qualityGates.notes: Iteration 4 depends on Iteration 3a (ClaudeService pattern in rideglory-api backend). No hard gate on Pencil design (unlike Iteration 3b). No blocker from other iterations. EventFormCubit and EventFormPage are pre-existing from earlier iterations — refactoring assumed to be in-place.
